zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes於1380年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes48歲，母親Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure44歲。他於1413年10月與Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1430年被列為appointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairn。他去世於1448年10月16日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾福布斯享年68歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes于1380年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，他的父亲John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes48岁，母亲Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure44岁。他于1413年10月与Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1430年被列为appointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairn。他去世于1448年10月16日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾福布斯享年68岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪。

nameMeanings.name: Forbes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Forbes in Tullynessle, Aberdeenshire, so named from Gaelic forba ‘field, district’ + the locative suffix -ais. The placename is pronounced in two syllables, with the stress on the second, and the surname until recently reflected this. Today, however, it is generally a monosyllable.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Firbhisigh ‘son of Fearbhisigh’, a personal name composed of elements meaning ‘man’ + ‘prosperity’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) in Connacht was famous for its traditional historians, compilers of the Book of Lecan.

variants.name: Fawbush
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , which ispronounced as two syllables in Aberdeenshire. Compare   Forbush  .

variants.name: Forbus
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , reflecting thetraditional pronunciation as two syllables.

variants.name: Forbush
meanings: Scottish: altered form of   Forbes  , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Altered form of German Vorbusch, a topographic name for someone living on the edge of a wood, from vor ‘in front of’ + North German Busch ‘wood, bush’.

variants.name: Furbush
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Forbes  , which is traditionally pronounced as two syllables. Compare   Furbish  .

variants.name: Forbis
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Forbes  , reflecting the traditional pronunciation as two syllables.

variants.name: Forbess
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Forbes  , reflecting the traditional pronunciation as two syllables.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes was born in 1380, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes, was 48 and his mother, Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure, was 44. He married Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester in October 1413, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. In 1430, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as appointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairn. He died on 16 October 1448, in Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 68, and was buried in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes est né en 1380, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester en octobre 1413, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. En 1430, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est appointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairn. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1448, à Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes 1380 in Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes 48 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure 44. Er hat im Oktober 1413 in Scotland Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. 1430, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als appointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairn aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1448 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes è nato il nel 1380 nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester nel ottobre 1413, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Nel 1430, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come appointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairn. Morì il 16 ottobre 1448, nel Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbesが1380年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbesは48歳，母Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunureは44歳であった。1413年10月にスコットランドでElizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1430年，50歳の時，職業はappointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairnと記録されている。彼は1448年10月16日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアフォーベズで68歳で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアバーディーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes(이)가 1380년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1413년 10월 스컷랜드에서 Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1430년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 appointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairn이었다. 그는 1448년 10월 16일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 포베스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르 압르디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes nasceu em 1380, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester em outubro de 1413, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Em 1430, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como appointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairn. Ele faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1448, em Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes родился в 1380 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester октябрь 1413 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1430 году, в возрасте 50 лет,  он работал по профессии appointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairn. Он умер 16 октября 1448 г. в местности форбесь, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия.

sm.from 1438 to 1445: mai le 1438 e o'o I le 1445

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Forbes 1st Lord Forbes nació en 1380, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Mary Douglas of Angus, latterly of Forbes, then Lochorwort and Yester en octubre de 1413, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. En 1430, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era appointed as life-long sheriff of aberdeen and baillie of strathnairn. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1448, en Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.
